title: Triad Mission Loop V1
summary: Activate the first real three-role firm loop where David gives only the seed, Nerah cuts the mission, Eidan executes it, and Taren reviews or promotes it.

charter.objective: Prove one bounded internal mission can travel through seed intake, CEO cut, worker execution, reviewer decision, and only true Type-1 escalation without collapsing back into David micro-steering.
charter.primaryMetric: A mission launched from `missionCell: triad-mission-loop-v1` completes a real worker-to-reviewer loop with less David supervision than the current single-lane mission-autonomy path.
guardMetrics: No skipping reviewer truth because the worker branch is green.
No David micro-management inside normal Type-2 terrain.
No new orchestration platform or agent swarm expansion is opened.
charter.budget: One bounded multi-role mission container with midpoint commits allowed and reviewer truth required before promotion.
charter.runtime: A single triad proving container that must include CEO cut, worker execution, reviewer verdict, and durable promotion or honest escalation.
allowedZones: targeted tests and bounded live proof
forbiddenZones: pretending chat summaries are a replacement for runtime review flow

type2Autonomy: bounded worker execution inside the stated blast radius
bounded reviewer correction, narrow patches, and promotion preparation
runtime-visible mission-state transitions that stay reversible
type1Escalations: main branch mutation outside reviewed merge flow
strategy or scope changes that recut the mission itself
escalationPath: stop at the boundary instead of guessing
state the exact action and why it is Type-1
escalate to David with the narrowest truthful packet

oberreviewerTriggers: the reviewer lane is being bypassed by direct promotion pressure
the CEO cut remains only narrative and does not produce actionable worker and reviewer packets
the worker-reviewer loop widens into a new platform instead of one bounded proving container
requiredEvidence: targeted tests or runtime proof for the touched handoff seam
the smallest truthful statement of what changed because the reviewer existed
stopReasons: remaining work has widened into a new program

replayChecks: the same mission can be reconstructed from repo truth and role packets instead of one long David restating thread
a reviewer verdict changes the actual path of the mission
the next triad mission would require less direct David steering than before
guardChecks: worker and reviewer are distinct states, not one blended lane
the mission remains bounded instead of becoming open-ended orchestration theater
successSignals: one real mission crosses at least CEO cut, worker execution, and reviewer verdict
the reviewer lane prevents or corrects at least one meaningful issue
David sees mainly seed, final summary, and true Type-1 escalations

defaultTargets: the minimal runtime seam that now carries triad state durably
promoteWhen: the worker-reviewer loop exists as real runtime or packet truth
the reviewer changes the mission path in a reviewable way
the next triad mission can start from smaller David input than before
stayExperimentalWhen: role separation exists only in docs
the reviewer verdict does not affect actual flow
the loop still depends on heavy manual retelling
demoteWhen: the reviewer lane adds more supervision load than it removes
the triad loop collapses back into one execution lane plus commentary
promotion would hide that role separation is still mostly theatrical

firmBound: David seed -> CEO cut -> worker execution -> reviewer verdict -> Type-1 escalation only when needed
promotion only after reviewer truth exists
less David supervision as the main success direction
carrierBound: current prompt and wakeup context injection
the present runtime-specific role handoff surfaces

starterPath.trigger: After repeatable mission-cell proof is honestly complete, create one bounded internal mission with `missionCell: triad-mission-loop-v1` and explicit worker/reviewer deliverables in `doneWhen`.
issueTemplate: doneWhen: <CEO cut + worker pass + reviewer verdict + promotion or true escalation>
startupSequence: Validate the mission cell contract with `paperclipai mission cell validate`.
Confirm `repeatable-live-mission-cell-proof-v1` is honestly complete before activation.
Cut explicit worker and reviewer packets from the same seed.
Carry worker execution to a reviewable state instead of promoting directly.
Require a reviewer verdict before promotion or David escalation.
firstProbe: Confirm the mission packet names separate CEO, worker, and reviewer responsibilities.
Confirm the first handoff surface makes reviewer state visible instead of implied.
Run the smallest test or runtime proof that shows reviewer truth can actually change the path.
